name: Zombroad
author: Poki
description: Hit the road and slay some zombies in Zombroad! In this action driving game, you'll have to upgrade your car from a heap of scrap to a weapon on wheels as you make your way to safety. Every zombie you kill earns you coins, which you can use to buy upgrades to make your car better, faster and stronger. There are two challenging worlds to drive trough and two different cars to upgrade. Can you make it all the way down the road without getting bitten? How to play Zombroad? Use W to hit the gas! Use A and D or the left and right arrow keys to steer! Who created Zombroad? Zombroad was created by OSA Studios. Play their other games on Poki: Smash It ! How can I play Zombroad for free? You can play Zombroad for free on Poki. Can I play Zombroad on mobile devices and desktop? Zombroad can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
